chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, CIRCUIT COURT, HYDERABAD. C.P. No. S- 299 of 2014 DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE 30.6.2014 Petitioner present in person Mr. Ashfaq Nabi Qazi A.A.G. Petitioner present in person states that he is being harassed by the private respondents through the official respondents who are otherwise his brothers interse. Syed Mujeeb Alam Shah advocate has filed power on behalf of private respondents, who are also present in person and have denied to have caused any kind of harassment to the petitioner. They further state that proceedings in respect of civil dispute are going on between them before the IInd Senior Civil Judge, Hyderabad and on account of that dispute this petition has been filed by the petitioner. The official respondents are present in court and have submitted their comments which are taken on record. In the comments they have denied to have caused any kind of harassment to the petitioner. In view of the statement made by the private respondents as well as comments filed by the official respondents through learned A.A.G. this petition is disposed of, however, with directions to the official respondents not to cause any kind of harassment to the petitioner without due course of law and provide protection to him at the time of need. JUDGE k/-
